case_title: TESSCO VS. HUGO SANTANA et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT & COMPLT; AND CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET [DECL OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERETO], PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TESSCO SERVED AUG-27-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANTANA, HUGO

GUERRINI IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT RE: CALCULATION OF JUDGMENT, INCLUDING INTEREST AND WAIVER OF ATTORNEY'S FEES; REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL; [PROPOSED] JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TESSCO SERVED OCT-22-2012, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT SANTANA, HUGO

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TESSCO AS TO DEFENDANT SANTANA, HUGO DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-11-2013
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $440.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SANTANA, HUGO
